title: v1.1
changelog:
New
- Theme customization (change theme and map icon colors)
- Add favorite bus stops or lines
- App language switcher

Updates & Improvements
- Improved bus status handling
- Better focus on selected stop on the map

UI Updates
- Improved focused stop icon
- Arrival list now displays seconds
- Auto-updating arrival list

Live Bus Tracking Enhancements
- Displays delay
- Shows next stop
